test.details: 83 unit tests + 1 integration test + 16 doc tests passed

appliedUpdates.description: Added guidance for synthesis reviewer: cross-cut reviews and module reviews overlap significantly, expect deduplication. Pattern observed: module-specific findings often appear in cross-cut reviews (e.g., 'decode pipeline spin loop' appeared in gui, threading, and performance reviews).

userReportedIssues.originalReport: some excess cpu and memory usage, some related to the ui
rootCausesIdentified: Audio preload memory (full track decoded into memory)
Spin loop with 1ms sleep on full frame channel
Multiple Mutex acquisitions per playback frame
Frame pool allocates ~24-40MB per video editor
Thread spawning per video (decoder, audio stream, audio preload)
